name: GeoEdge
description: Ad quality and malvertising protection platform for publishers, SSPs and app developers with real-time creative verification.

seo.title: GeoEdge — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: GeoEdge: Ad quality and malvertising protection platform for publishers, SSPs and app developers with real-time creative verification.

when_to_use: Malvertising detection and creative verification for SSP and publisher inventory
Real-time ad quality scanning before serving to protect user experience
Auto-refresh ad block and redirect prevention for mobile web publishers
Creative safety enforcement for app developers monetizing via ad networks

pros: Protects publishers and apps from bad ads
Covers web, in-app and video creatives
cons: Ad quality tool, not an attribution platform
More relevant to publishers than advertisers
review.verdict: Top-tier ad quality and malvertising defense, but mismapped as mobile attribution — it solves a different problem.
review.best_for: Publishers, SSPs and app devs blocking malicious creatives in real time.
review.not_for: Marketers looking for install attribution or SKAN conversion measurement.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
